LoginRegisterOpen Agent
Policy-firstNothing runs without your approval

An AI wallet that follows your rules

Describe what you want in plain language. The agent interprets your intent, checks it against your safety policies, shows you the plan, and executes only when you approve. No blind automation, no surprises.

No account required — open the terminal and try it now.

What Marcus is

An AI agent wallet you can actually trust

Marcus is an intelligent wallet interface that lets you manage funds using natural language commands — "find low-risk yield up to 50 CC" or "show me a safe strategy for 10 CC." The agent parses your intent, evaluates it against your own safety rules, shows you exactly what it found and why, and only acts when you explicitly approve.

The problem it solves

Most AI finance tools execute blindly. They claim convenience but give you no visibility into their reasoning, no control over their boundaries, and no record of what they did. Marcus inverts that by design: policy enforcement comes first, execution comes second, and you are in control throughout.

Every command follows this flow

1

Intent

Agent parses your natural-language command

2

Policy

Every rule is evaluated before anything proceeds

3

Plan

You review the proposal and reasoning

4

Execute

Only with your explicit approval

5

Receipt

Complete record of what happened and why

Each step is logged and reviewable in the activity feed.

How it works

From prompt to execution in five steps

Every command goes through the same flow — no exceptions, no shortcuts.

1
Prompt

You speak naturally

Type a command in plain English — no special syntax, no DeFi jargon required.

"Find the cheapest yield up to 50 CC"

2
Interpret

Agent parses your intent

The system extracts what you want, how much, and any constraints you specified.

Action: yield · Amount: 50 CC · Risk: low

3
Policy

Safety rules are checked

Every configured policy is evaluated. Transactions that violate your rules are blocked automatically.

MAX_PER_TRADE ✓ · DENYLIST ✓ · DAILY_LIMIT ✓

4
Plan

You review the proposal

See what was found, why it is recommended, what could go wrong, and the estimated cost.

1 opportunity · APR: 4.2% · Risk: LOW

5
Execute

You approve, then it runs

Nothing happens without your explicit confirmation. You are always in control.

Waiting for your approval…

Why it matters

Agent + budget control: why the model matters

AI execution without constraints is a liability. Marcus combines natural language convenience with hard safety boundaries.

Budget limits that hold

Set per-trade caps, daily limits, and approval thresholds. The agent tracks usage in real time and cannot exceed your configured boundaries — even if you ask it to.

Safer execution model

Policies are not suggestions. They are hard constraints enforced server-side. The agent cannot execute outside your rules, even if prompted to do so.

Full explainability

Every parsed intent, policy decision, and execution step is logged. You always know what happened, why it was allowed, and what it cost.

Audit trail

Every command, policy check, and execution result is recorded with a timestamp. Policy decisions are tracked separately from execution outcomes.

No blind execution

The agent shows the full plan — opportunity, reasoning, and risks — before asking for your approval. No background transactions, no surprises.

Accessible without an account

Try the public terminal without registering. See how the agent works with demo data before committing to an account.

Two ways to use Marcus

Guest terminal or registered dashboard

Start in the public terminal without an account. Register to persist your policies and activity.

Guest / Public Terminal

Anyone can open the agent terminal and try the full flow with demo data. See how intent parsing, policy evaluation, and plan review work — no sign-up required.

No account needed
  • Natural language command interface
  • Intent parsing and interpretation
  • Policy evaluation (demo policies)
  • Plan review and approval step
  • Demo wallet (500M CC simulated)
  • Activity log for the session

Registered User / Dashboard

Create an account to persist your policies, track your activity across sessions, and unlock the full dashboard view. The same policy-first execution model, with continuity.

Full access
  • All guest capabilities
  • Persistent policy configuration
  • Cross-session activity history
  • Wallet overview and holdings
  • Yield opportunity tracking
  • Real policy engine (not demo)

How you interact

A terminal built for clarity, not complexity

The Marcus agent interface is a conversational terminal — you type what you want, it shows you what it found, explains why, and waits. It is designed to be read, not just used.

Conversational, not scripted

Ask follow-up questions, refine your request, ask "why this option?" — the terminal handles it.

Every response is a record

The terminal logs the full exchange. You can review what you asked, what Marcus found, and what you approved.

No hidden state

Marcus shows its reasoning at each step. If it blocks something, it tells you exactly which policy triggered and why.

marcus terminal

›Find the cheapest yield up to 50 CC
marcus

Found 1 opportunity:

StableYield — APR 4.2% — Risk LOW

Policy check: MAX_PER_TRADE ✓ · DENYLIST ✓ · DAILY_LIMIT ✓

›Waiting for your approval…

Honest framing

What is real, what is simulated

Every capability is labeled accurately. No inflated claims.

Policy EngineREAL

Server-side deterministic evaluation of MAX_PER_TRADE, MAX_DAILY, DENYLIST, APPROVAL_THRESHOLD, and compound conditions. Fully functional.

Intent ParserREAL

LLM-based intent parsing with rule-based fallback. Tested with realistic command variations.

Agent TerminalREAL

The conversational interface, plan display, approval flow, and session logging are production-grade.

Market DataSIMULATED

Opportunities are seeded demo data. No live DeFi protocol integration yet.

Wallet ExecutionSIMULATED

Demo wallet with 500M CC. Live signing available via NEXT_PUBLIC_LOOP_ENABLED=true (requires custody setup).

The policy engine and agent logic are fully real. Market data and wallet execution are simulated by default. Enable NEXT_PUBLIC_LOOP_ENABLED=true for live signing (requires custody setup).

Ready to try it?

Open the agent terminal, type a command, and see the full flow — from natural language to policy check to execution plan. No account needed.

MarcusDEMO

Demo mode — policy engine and agent logic are fully functional. Wallet execution is simulated.
